title: Muhammad Ali: Through the Eyes of the World
original_title: Muhammad Ali - Through The Eyes Of The World
overview: "This is a kid who just said it. I'm the greatest - and he said it with poetry. And I don't mean just the poems that he wrote but with the poetic energy, the poetic spirit" - James Earl Jones.  Through the eys of the world is a unique account of one of the great icons of the 20th century, told by family, friends and fans from all over the world.
